I'm the BookFlow assistant, powered by AI. I'm here to help you manage your scheduling and answer questions about the platform.

I can answer questions about BookFlow, your appointments, clients, services, and plan. Try asking:
• How many appointments today?
• Who are my clients?
• How to add a service?
• What's my plan?
I'm here to help! What specific issue are you facing?
